title: Rebuild Megumi Ogata interview snippet
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild Megumi Ogata interview snippet             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 4:07 am Thought I might as well spoiler-tag this to be on the safe side. This is a brief snippet, but very interesting stuff nevertheless: https://web.archive.org/web/20110909175841/http://zepy.momotato.com/2009/07/07/ogata-megumi-on-evangelion-voice-acting/ Enjoy! Edit: Dead link, fixed!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Nov 08, 2009 6:26 am I'd always wondered how Ogata went about the Hospital scene in EOE, but now we know she drew 'inspiration' from Gendo. Nice to know the seiyus had a bit of fun during their time on the original series/movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Nov 08, 2009 6:46 am Indeed....."recordings where i had to shout a lot near the end of the 2.0 movie"? Seriously? In this day and age has it really come to this when we have to spoiler tag a new thread because of this scarce reference to 2.0? This is hardly spoiler worthy. Honestly.....it doesnt even specify which scenes from 2.0 that Shinji shouts a lot. I could say that Shinji also shouted a lot near the end of the original NGE and End of Eva as well. Simply put "shouting" a lot just means he's in a state of duress. Or you can assume hes being hurt in some action scene. Meh.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 08, 2009 7:01 am Electric Sachiel wrote: This is hardly spoiler worthy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 11:32 am Electric Sachiel: And you're making such a big deal about this why? Thread status can always be changed you know. It just there have been idiots who did spoil things about 2.0 in spoiler-free threads before.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Nov 08, 2009 11:38 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Electric Sachiel: And you're making such a big deal about this why? Thread status can always be changed you know. It just there have been idiots who did spoil things about 2.0 in spoiler-free threads before.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 12:10 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: I was worked up a bit by this because as you know i was banned for a time due to this strict Spoiler regime.....yeah.
